untranslatable_reason: Signal requires z-score calculation from custom VX calendar spread ratio (back/front) and ADF stationarity test, neither of which are available in the allowed indicator set. The india_vix proxy cannot replicate the specific mean-reversion properties of the VX calendar spread ratio or the ADF statistical test at 99% probability threshold. Custom synthetic indicators and advanced statistical tests are required.
translation_notes: Original signal uses specialized derivatives strategy (VX calendar spreads) with z-score thresholds and ADF stationarity confirmation. Attempted proxy using india_vix with SMA-20 as a reverting mean, but this is not a faithful translation of the original logic. The 15-day lookback, z-score threshold (>1σ), and ADF confirmation criteria cannot be expressed with standard OHLCV indicators alone.
